name: alinag-lumina-platform
description: Alinag Lumina — production e-commerce monorepo (Next.js 15 web + Express/MongoDB API)

scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint
